title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Supertech

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Supertech
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!
